properties.displayName: Deny Creating a Microsoft Fabric Capacity
properties.description: This policy prevents users from creating a Microsoft Fabric Capacity resource.

nonComplianceMessages.message: Deploying a Microsoft Fabric Capacity in the Landing Zones is managed by the Data Foundations team. See TechDocs for more information: https://developer.gov.bc.ca/docs/default/component/public-cloud-techdocs/azure/azure-services/external-fabric/
